actions.description: Generate speech in real-time using ElevenLabs WebSocket-based text-to-speech API. Receives text via WebSocket, forwards to ElevenLabs for speech synthesis, and streams generated audio chunks back.
actions.name: createRealtimeSpeech

properties.description: Voice to use for converting the text into speech.
properties.label: Voice
properties.name: voiceId

properties.description: The model to use for text-to-speech generation.
properties.label: Model
properties.name: model_id

properties.description: Voice stability (0.0 to 1.0). Lower values produce more variation, higher values produce more consistent speech.
properties.label: Stability
properties.name: stability

properties.description: Voice similarity boost (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values make the voice more closely match the original voice.
properties.label: Similarity Boost
properties.name: similarityBoost

properties.description: The output audio format.
properties.label: Output Format
properties.name: outputFormat

actions.title: Create Realtime Speech

actions.description: Transcribe audio in real-time using ElevenLabs WebSocket-based speech-to-text API. Receives audio via WebSocket, forwards to ElevenLabs for transcription, and streams transcription results back.
actions.name: createRealtimeTranscript

properties.description: The model to use for real-time transcription.
properties.label: Model
properties.name: model_id

properties.description: The language code for transcription (e.g., 'en' for English). If not specified, the language is auto-detected.
properties.label: Language Code
properties.name: languageCode

properties.description: The sample rate of the audio in Hz.
properties.label: Sample Rate
properties.name: sampleRate

properties.description: The format of the audio data.
properties.label: Audio Format
properties.name: audioFormat

properties.description: Whether to include word-level timestamps in the transcription.
properties.label: Include Timestamps
properties.name: includeTimestamps

actions.title: Create Realtime Transcript

actions.description: Turn text into sound effects for your videos, voice-overs or video games using the most advanced sound effects model in the world.
actions.name: createSoundEffect

properties.description: The text that will get converted into a sound effect.
properties.label: Text
properties.name: text

actions.title: Create Sound Effect

actions.description: Converts text into speech using a voice of your choice and returns audio.
actions.name: createSpeech

properties.description: Voice you want to use for converting the text into speech.
properties.label: Voice
properties.name: voiceId

properties.description: Text you want to convert into speech.
properties.label: Text
properties.name: text

actions.title: Create Speech

actions.description: Generate speech from text with precise character-level timing information for audio-text synchronization.
actions.name: createSpeechWithTiming

properties.description: Base64 encoded audio data
properties.name: audio_base64

properties.description: Base64 encoded audio data
properties.name: audio_base64

properties.description: Voice you want to use for converting the text into speech.
properties.label: Voice
properties.name: voiceId

properties.description: Text you want to convert into speech.
properties.label: Text
properties.name: text

actions.title: Create Speech With Timing

actions.description: Transcribe an audio or video file.
actions.name: createTranscript

properties.description: The detected language code (e.g. ‘eng’ for English).
properties.name: language_code

properties.description: The confidence score of the language detection (0 to 1).
properties.name: language_probability

properties.description: The raw text of the transcription.
properties.name: text

properties.description: List of words with their timing information.
The word or sound that was transcribed.
properties.name: text

properties.description: The start time of the word or sound in seconds
properties.name: start

properties.description: The end time of the word or sound in seconds
properties.name: end

properties.description: The type of the word or sound. ‘audio_event’ is used for non-word sounds like laughter or footsteps. Allowed values: word, spacing and audio_event.
properties.name: type
words

properties.description: The detected language code (e.g. ‘eng’ for English).
properties.name: language_code

properties.description: The confidence score of the language detection (0 to 1).

words

properties.description: The ID of the model to use for transcription, currently only ‘scribe_v1’ is available.
properties.label: Model
properties.name: model_id

properties.description: The file object with content to transcribe. All major audio and video formats are supported. The file size must be less than 1GB.
properties.label: File Entry
properties.name: file
